zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy De Châtillon II於1142年出生在法國德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內時，他的父親Hendrik Van Chatillan21歲，母親Elizabeth Van Crepy21歲。他於大約1161年與Alix de Dreux結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1168年4月6日在他的家鄉享年26歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy De Châtillon II于1142年出生在法国德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內时，他的父亲Hendrik Van Chatillan21岁，母亲Elizabeth Van Crepy21岁。他于大约1161年与Alix de Dreux结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1168年4月6日在他的家乡享年26岁，埋葬在法国德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy De Châtillon II was born in 1142, in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France, his father, Hendrik Van Chatillan, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Van Crepy, was 21. He married Alix de Dreux about 1161. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 April 1168, in his hometown, at the age of 26, and was buried in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy De Châtillon II est né en 1142, à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Hendrik Van Chatillan, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Van Crepy, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Dreux environ 1161. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1168, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy De Châtillon II 1142 in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik Van Chatillan 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Van Crepy 21. Er hat um 1161 Alix de Dreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. April 1168 im Alter von 26 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy De Châtillon II è nato il nel 1142 nel Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Hendrik Van Chatillan, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Van Crepy, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alix de Dreux circa 1161. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1168, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy De Châtillon IIが1142年にフランスグランド エストマルンチaティロン-スル-マルンで生まれた時，父Hendrik Van Chatillanは21歳，母Elizabeth Van Crepyは21歳であった。約1161年にAlix de Dreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1168年4月6日に故郷で26歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストマルンチaティロン-スル-マルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy De Châtillon II(이)가 1142년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 cha틸론-수-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik Van Chatillan(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Van Crepy(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1161년 Alix de Dreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1168년 4월 6일 그의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 cha틸론-수-마니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy De Châtillon II nasceu em 1142, em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Hendrik Van Chatillan, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Van Crepy, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Dreux aproximadamente 1161. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1168, em sua cidade natal, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy De Châtillon II родился в 1142 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, марн, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Hendrik Van Chatillan было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Van Crepy, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Dreux около 1161 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 апреля 1168 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, марн, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy De Châtillon II nació en 1142, en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Hendrik Van Chatillan, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Van Crepy, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alix de Dreux aproximadamente 1161. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1168, en su pueblo, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia.
